top_signals.title: Trump’s tariff on drugs targets one of the world’s most globalized supply chains
top_signals.summary:
The Trump administration aims to impose major tariffs on generic medicines, targeting one of the world’s most globalized supply chains.

The post Trump’s tariff on drugs targets one of the world’s most globalized supply chains  appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Won’t Give Up on Strategy, Sees 170% Upside
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. is confronting a collapse of confidence almost everywhere — except among Wall Street analysts.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
